name: 100% Français 🇫🇷
author: Beatify Community
description: 100 French-language hits across six decades — chanson, pop, rap and Eurodance, from Jacques Dutronc and Notre-Dame de Paris to Aya Nakamura and Bosh. Sourced from the community 'HITSTER - 100% Français' request (#1496). Years and ISRCs enriched via the Deezer API; cross-provider URIs (Apple Music / YouTube Music / Tidal) pending a follow-up enrichment pass.
